caption: A recording of a meeting for the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" is shown, dated "April 12, 2019," with a green banner at the bottom stating "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage" and an "ORCA" logo in the corner. The setting is a formal room with wood paneling and tables. In the initial shots, several people are present, including a man in a suit with his hand to his face and others standing or sitting in the background. The scene then shifts to a wider view of the committee members. A man in a dark suit sits with his hand on his chin, while others sit beside him, including a woman with blonde hair and a man in a grey sweater. Various items are on the table, including water bottles and papers. The people remain mostly stationary, listening or reflecting during the proceedings.
